response.justification: Candidate has extensive (25+ years) software development experience across many stacks and some developer tooling exposure (MCP code generators, CI/CD setup, custom test runner Trial, Fluent-Asserts library), but the resume shows no explicit people-management or team-leadership tenure, no mobile-platform ecosystem experience at scale, and no evidence of leading organizational change. Strong individual-contributor and craftsmanship profile, weak match for a people-leadership EngProd manager role.
strengths: Deep developer-tooling background: built a D test runner (Trial), assertion library, CI/CD infra, MCP tooling
Long, broad engineering career with TDD, pairing, trunk-based development advocacy
Teaching/community track record (Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos, workshops) signals mentorship capability
concerns: No explicit people-management or direct-report leadership experience listed — role requires 2+ years
No mobile-platform ecosystem experience (iOS side-work only; no Android/large mobile build systems)
No demonstrated organizational-change leadership or roadmap ownership at manager scope
